title: September 18
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}

'''September 18''' is the 261st day of the year (262nd in leap years). There are 104 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1960s#1963|1963]] – [[John Powell]] is born.
*1963 – [[Dan Povenmire]] is born.
*[[1974]] – [[E. Anne Convery]] is born.
*[[1975]] – [[Jason Sudeikis]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 134|''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 134]] published.
*[[1984]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 90|''Star Wars'' 90]] published.
*[[1996]] – [[Classic Star Wars: Devilworlds 2|''Classic Star Wars: Devilworlds'' 2]] published.
*1996 – ''[[Boba Fett: When the Fat Lady Swings]]'' published.
*[[1999]] – ''[[Star Wars: Pit Droids]]'' released.
*[[2002]] – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 38]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – ''[[News of the Wyrd]]'' released.
*2003 – ''[[With the Band]]'' released.
*[[2007]] – [[Christine Hewett]] dies.
*[[2013]] – ''[[Star Wars Volume 1: In the Shadow of Yavin]]'' published.
*2013 – ''[[Star Wars: Dark Times Volume 6—Fire Carrier]]'' published.
*2013 – [[Dark Times—A Spark Remains 3|''Dark Times—A Spark Remains'' 3]] published.
*2013 – ''[[Angry Birds Star Wars II]]'' released.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Join the Resistance: Attack on Starkiller Base]]'' published.
*2018 – ''[[Star Wars: The Complete Visual Dictionary, New Edition]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 36|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 36]] published.
*2019 – [[Age of Resistance - Rey 1|''Age of Resistance - Rey'' 1]] published.
*2019 – [[Age of Resistance - Rose Tico 1|''Age of Resistance - Rose Tico'' 1]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Resistance Animation 3|''Star Wars Resistance Animation'' 3]] published.
*[[2024]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 50|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 50]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2023) 10|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2023) 10]] published.
*[[2025]] – [[Star Wars: The Power of the Force (audiobook)|''Star Wars: The Power of the Force'' audiobook]] released.
*2025 – "[[Rey's Lightsaber On The Loose]]" released on [[StarWarsKids.com]].
